Query
  Pipeline
    Stage eventstats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call avg
            Ident duration_ms
          Alias svc_avg
      By
        Ident service
    Stage extend
      Assign deviation
        Binary -
          Ident duration_ms
          Ident svc_avg
    Stage where
      Binary >
        Ident deviation
        Int 0
    Stage keep
      Pattern service
      Pattern duration_ms
      Pattern svc_avg
      Pattern deviation
    Stage sort
      SortKey -
        Ident deviation
    Stage head
      N 5
